name: Arrival of the Goddess 🥥 (NTRMAN) | Netori POV
description:
"When a virus outbreak terrorizes the world, two brave scientists are sent on a mission to find the secrets of the only thing that can save them. The “Youtan” plant is said to hold be a miraculous herb with unimaginable healing properties that may be used as a cure, the only problem is there is only one place on earth that has them. Join John and Claire as they venture onto the mysterious island hoping for answers"

🥥🥥 GREATEST PEAK SO FAR!! 🥥🥥
